articles.title: California Resources (CRC) Price Target Increased by 15.54% to 75.24
California Resources (CRC) Price Target Raised to $67, ‘Neutral’ Rating Maintained

California Resources Corporation (CRC) Presents at 2026 NYSE Investor Access Day-Spring Energy & Utilities - Slideshow — 2026-03-24. The following slide deck was published by California Resources Corporation in conjunction with this event.
California Resources Boosted By Rising Brent-WTI Spread — Unlike most U.S. oil producers, CRC's pricing is based on Brent, which has become meaningfully higher than WTI.
